evals.name: migrate-deprecated-api
evals.prompt: We have a Python service that still calls `requests.get(...)` directly in a bunch of modules, but everything new is supposed to go through our `app/http_client.py` wrapper so retries and tracing are consistent. Write me a plan to find every direct usage and migrate it, and save the plan as a markdown file. I want to run it as a workflow afterward.
evals.expected_output: A markdown plan file with a scouting phase to find call sites, a per-file migration phase shaped as a pipeline (with worktree isolation noted because files are mutated in parallel), a verification phase, and a workflow skeleton that composes the phases.

evals.name: security-audit-auth
evals.prompt: I need a thorough security audit of our authentication module (login, session, token refresh). Give me a workflow plan for it — I'll execute it with the Workflow tool. Save it to docs/plans/.
evals.expected_output: A markdown plan with parallel finder phases across security dimensions, an adversarial / perspective-diverse verification phase that tries to refute findings, possibly a dedup barrier with a stated reason, and a skeleton script.

evals.name: research-vector-dbs
evals.prompt: Write a workflow plan to research the top vector databases (pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus) and produce a cited comparison report covering latency, cost, and ops burden. Save the plan somewhere sensible.
evals.expected_output: A markdown plan with a multi-modal research fan-out (pipeline per database), a claim-verification phase, a synthesis phase that needs a barrier (it consumes all results at once), and a workflow skeleton.
